tourDescription: This itinerary takes you through iconic American cities, combining cultural experiences, natural beauty, and relaxation. Explore New York, Washington, D.C., and Los Angeles in a way that’s both enriching and comfortable.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in New York City
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in New York City and check into your hotel. Spend the afternoon at leisure. Explore Times Square or take a relaxing stroll through Central Park in the evening

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: New York City - Iconic Sights
tourPlanDays.description: Take a leisurely morning cruise to the Statue of Liberty and Ellis Island. In the afternoon, visit the 9/11 Memorial and Museum, and enjoy panoramic views from the One World Observatory

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: New York City - Museums and Broadway
tourPlanDays.description: Explore the Metropolitan Museum of Art or the Museum of Modern Art. End the evening with a Broadway show in the Theater District.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: New York to Washington, D.C. (Train or Flight)
tourPlanDays.description: Take a morning train or flight to Washington, D.C. After checking in, enjoy a peaceful afternoon at the National Mall, visiting the Lincoln Memorial and the Washington Monument.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Washington, D.C. - History and Culture
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the day visiting the Smithsonian museums, such as the National Air and Space Museum and the National Museum of American History. Take a relaxing walk around the Tidal Basin or along the Potomac River.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 6: Washington, D.C. to Los Angeles
tourPlanDays.description: Take a leisurely morning flight to Los Angeles. Spend the evening relaxing, with an optional sunset visit to the Griffith Observatory for panoramic views of the city

tourPlanDays.title: Day 7: Los Angeles - Hollywood & Santa Monica
tourPlanDays.description: Explore Hollywood Boulevard and the famous Walk of Fame. Enjoy the afternoon at Santa Monica Pier and its beautiful beach. End the day with a peaceful dinner by the beach

tourPlanDays.title: Day 8: Los Angeles - Universal Studios or Getty Center
tourPlanDays.description: For a fun day, visit Universal Studios or spend a more relaxed day at the Getty Center, exploring art and enjoying its stunning gardens

tourPlanDays.title: Day 9: Los Angeles - Relax and Shop
tourPlanDays.description: Spend a leisurely day shopping at Beverly Hills or The Grove. Take time to relax at one of LA’s beautiful cafes or parks, or stroll down Venice Beach

tourPlanDays.title: Day 10: Departure from Los Angeles
tourPlanDays.description: Enjoy a relaxing morning before heading to the airport for your return flight.

tourDescription: This three-day tour explores the ancient wonders of Axum and the breathtaking rock-hewn churches of Gheralta. Discover Axum’s iconic obelisks, the legendary St. Mary of Zion Church, and the ruins of the Queen of Sheba’s Palace. Travel to Gheralta for an adventurous climb to Abuna Yemata Guh, offering stunning views and centuries-old frescoes. Visit more hidden rock churches before concluding the trip with a scenic drive to Mekele for your flight back to Addis Ababa.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Axum – Exploring the Ancient Kingdom
tourPlanDays.description: Take a morning flight from Addis Ababa to Axum, the heart of Ethiopia’s ancient civilization. Upon arrival, check into your hotel and start exploring the Axum Obelisks, towering monuments from the Aksumite Empire. Visit the St. Mary of Zion Church, believed to house the Ark of the Covenant, and continue to the Queen of Sheba’s Palace, where legends say she once ruled. In the afternoon, visit the Tombs of King Kaleb and Gebre Meskel, then explore the Axum Museum for deeper insights into this once-powerful empire. Enjoy dinner at a local restaurant and rest for the night.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Drive to Gheralta – Exploring the Rock-Hewn Churches
tourPlanDays.description: After breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Gheralta, a region famous for its breathtaking rock formations and ancient rock-hewn churches. Upon arrival, check into your lodge and prepare for an adventure to Abuna Yemata Guh, one of Ethiopia’s most awe-inspiring churches, perched high on a cliffside. The hike to the church is challenging but rewarding, offering panoramic views of the Gheralta mountains. In the afternoon, visit Maryam Korkor and Daniel Korkor, two other stunning rock churches known for their frescoes and remote locations. Spend the evening relaxing at your lodge, enjoying the sunset over the rugged landscape.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: More of Gheralta – Drive to Mekele – Flight to Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: Start your morning with a visit to another hidden gem of Gheralta, such as Debre Tsion or Yohannes Maequddi, known for their intricate carvings and spiritual ambiance. Afterward, begin your journey toward Mekele, enjoying the scenic drive through the Tigray highlands. Upon arrival in Mekele, have lunch before transferring to the airport for your flight back to Addis Ababa, concluding your Axum and Gheralta adventure.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Addis Ababa to Robe – Bale Mountains National Park
tourPlanDays.description: Morning flight from Addis Ababa to Robe Airport. Upon arrival, drive to Bale Mountains National Park and enjoy scenic views of the highlands and forests along the way. Visit Dinsho, the park headquarters, where you can spot endemic wildlife such as the Mountain Nyala, Menelik’s Bushbuck, and Bale Monkeys. Continue to your lodge for check-in and a relaxing evening surrounded by nature.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Explore Bale Mountains National Park
tourPlanDays.description: After breakfast, embark on a full-day excursion inside the park. Drive across the Sofan Plateau, the highest alpine plateau in Africa, home to the rare and beautiful Ethiopian Wolf — the world’s rarest canid. Enjoy the stunning scenery of Harenna Forest, filled with giant trees, waterfalls, and abundant birdlife. Optional short hikes or coffee experience with local farmers in the forest. Return to the lodge in the evening for dinner and relaxation.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Bale Mountains - Robe Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: After breakfast, drive back to Robe and take your return flight to Addis Ababa. Depending on flight timing, enjoy a short morning walk or visit to a nearby village before departure. Upon arrival in Addis, transfer to your hotel or connect to your international flight.

tourDescription: After a wonderful morning in Entoto, make your way down to Shiro Meda, the city’s largest traditional clothing market and the finest spot to shop hand-woven cotton clothing, primarily for women. Following that, pay a visit to the National Museum, where Ethiopia’s oldest resident, Lucy, is housed. The next destination is the Selassie (Trinity) church, which is near to the National Museum and is one of Addis Ababa’s most prominent churches as well as Haile Selassie’s ultimate resting place. Then go to Unity Park, to see natural, cultural & historical aspects of Ethiopia in one place.

tourPrice.text: EXPLORE THE LEGENDARY CITY OF ADDIS ABABA

included: A vehicle with an expert driver
Excellent insight into the history and culture of Ethiopia

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Addis Ababa to Semera - Drive to Afdera (Danakil)
tourPlanDays.description: Take a morning flight from Addis Ababa to Semera, the capital of the Afar region. Upon arrival, meet your local guide and drive toward Lake Afdera, located in the heart of the Danakil Depression. Along the way, enjoy the dramatic desert scenery and meet members of the Afar community, known for their resilience in this harsh landscape. Relax by the salt lake in the evening and witness a beautiful desert sunset.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Explore Dallol & Salt Mines
tourPlanDays.description: Early morning departure to explore Dallol, one of the lowest and hottest places on Earth. Discover the otherworldly landscapes filled with colorful sulfur springs, salt formations, and steaming fumaroles. Visit the Afar salt miners at Lake Asale and witness traditional salt cutting and camel caravans crossing the shimmering salt plains. In the afternoon, return to camp for dinner and rest.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Erta Ale Volcano - Return to Semera then fly back to Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: After an early breakfast, drive toward Erta Ale Volcano, famous for its active lava lake. Depending on timing and accessibility, hike to the crater to see the glowing lava (if activity permits). Later, drive back to Semera for your return flight to Addis Ababa, concluding your unforgettable Danakil adventure.

tourDescription: This 5-day Dubai trip combines iconic city tours, thrilling desert safaris, and a romantic dinner cruise, offering a mix of modern attractions and unique Arabian experiences.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Dubai
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Dubai and transfer to your hotel. Spend the rest of the day relaxing and settling in. You can explore the hotel’s amenities, enjoy the nearby attractions, or take a casual stroll around Dubai Marina to soak in the vibrant atmosphere of the city.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Dubai City Tour
tourPlanDays.description: Embark on a Dubai city tour to explore the city’s most iconic landmarks. Visit the Burj Khalifa, the world’s tallest building, and enjoy breathtaking views of the city from the observation deck. Continue to Dubai Mall, the largest shopping center, and explore the Dubai Fountain show. Also, stop by the Palm Jumeirah, a man-made island, and visit the luxurious Atlantis the Palm. In the evening, you can relax at a local café or shop for souvenirs.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Desert Safari
tourPlanDays.description: Experience an unforgettable desert safari. In the afternoon, head into the desert for dune bashing in a 4x4 vehicle, followed by a camel ride. As the evening sets, enjoy a traditional Arabian dinner with cultural performances like belly dancing and Tanoura shows at a desert camp. The stunning sunset over the golden sands makes this a unique and memorable experience.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Leisure Day & Cruise Dinner
tourPlanDays.description: Enjoy a leisurely day at your own pace. You can visit local attractions like the Dubai Marina or Jumeirah Beach, or spend time at La Mer for shopping and dining. In the evening, enjoy a dinner cruise aboard a traditional Dhow boat. Savor a buffet dinner while cruising along the Dubai Creek or Dubai Marina, offering amazing views of the illuminated skyline.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Relax and Departure
tourPlanDays.description: On your last day, enjoy some free time to relax, shop for souvenirs, or explore more of Dubai’s attractions before transferring to the airport for your flight back home.

tourDescription: This journey takes you through Ethiopia’s rich history, breathtaking landscapes, and diverse cultures, from the ancient wonders of Bahir Dar and Lalibela to the dramatic landscapes of the Simien Mountains and Danakil Depression, ending with an unforgettable cultural experience in the Omo Valley.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Addis Ababa and explore key landmarks like the National Museum, Holy Trinity Cathedral, and Merkato, Africa’s largest open-air market.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Addis Ababa to Bahir Dar
tourPlanDays.description: Fly to Bahir Dar and take a boat trip on Lake Tana, visiting ancient island monasteries. In the afternoon, drive to the Blue Nile Falls for a short hike and scenic views.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Bahir Dar to Gondar
tourPlanDays.description: Drive to Gondar, Ethiopia’s former royal capital, and explore the UNESCO-listed Fasil Ghebbi castle complex, Debre Berhan Selassie Church, and the ancient bath of Emperor Fasilides.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Gondar to Simien Mountains National Park
tourPlanDays.description: Drive to the Simien Mountains, home to stunning landscapes and unique wildlife like Gelada baboons and Ethiopian wolves. Enjoy a light hike and overnight in the park.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Full Day in the Simien Mountains
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the day hiking in the Simien Mountains, exploring breathtaking viewpoints such as Imet Gogo and spotting diverse wildlife.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 6: Simien Mountains to Lalibela
tourPlanDays.description: Drive or fly to Lalibela, Ethiopia’s spiritual heart, known for its rock-hewn churches.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 7: Exploring Lalibela (First GRoup of Churches)
tourPlanDays.description: Visit the famous 11 rock-hewn churches, beginning with the first group, including Bet Medhane Alem, Bet Maryam, and Bet Meskel.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 8: Exploring Lalibela (Asheten Maryam & Second GRoup of Churches)
tourPlanDays.description: Take a morning hike to Asheten Maryam, a hilltop monastery offering panoramic views. In the afternoon, explore the second group of churches, including Bet Gabriel-Rufael and the iconic Bet Giyorgis.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 9: Lalibela to Semera
tourPlanDays.description: Drive to Semera, the gateway to the Danakil Depression.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 10: Semera to Danakil Depresion (Dallol & Salt Flats)
tourPlanDays.description: Drive to the Danakil Depression, one of the hottest places on Earth. Explore Dallol’s colorful sulfur springs, the salt flats, and traditional salt mining at Lake Karum

tourPlanDays.title: Day 11: Danakil Depression - Erta Ale Volcano Trek
tourPlanDays.description: Drive to Erta Ale, an active lava lake volcano. Trek overnight to the summit for a mesmerizing view of the lava lake.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 12: Drive from Erta Ale to Mekele
tourPlanDays.description: Descend from Erta Ale and drive back to Mekele for a well-earned rest.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 13: Mekele to Arba Minch via Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: Fly from Mekele to Addis Ababa, then take a connecting flight to Arba Minch, the gateway to the Omo Valley.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 14: Arba Minch - Lake Chamo & Dorze Village
tourPlanDays.description: Take a boat safari on Lake Chamo, home to crocodiles and hippos. Visit the Dorze tribe, famous for their beehive-shaped huts and weaving culture.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 15: Arba Minch to Turmi via Konso
tourPlanDays.description: Drive to Konso, a UNESCO-listed cultural site known for its terraced agriculture. Continue to Turmi, home of the Hamer tribe, known for their bull-jumping ceremonies

tourPlanDays.title: Day 16: Turmi - Karo & Hamer Tribes
tourPlanDays.description: Visit the Karo people in Korcho village, overlooking the Omo River. Return to Turmi for more cultural experiences, possibly witnessing the Evangadi dance.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 17: Turmi to Jinka - Dassanech Tribe
tourPlanDays.description: Travel to Omorate to visit the Dassanech tribe, crossing the Omo River by canoe. Continue to Jinka for an overnight stay.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 18: Jinka - Mursi Tribe & Flight to Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: Visit the Mursi tribe, famous for their lip plates, before flying back to Addis Ababa.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 19: Departure from Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: Transfer to the airport for your international flight, concluding your Ethiopian adventure.

tourDescription: This itinerary offers an exciting blend of Parisian elegance and Frankfurt’s mix of modernity and history. Experience Paris’s iconic landmarks, including the Eiffel Tower and Louvre, and explore the charming streets of Frankfurt, with highlights such as the Römer Square and the stunning Main Tower.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Paris
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Paris and check into your hotel. Spend the rest of the day exploring at a leisurely pace. Take a stroll down the Champs-Élysées and visit the Arc de Triomphe. Enjoy a relaxed dinner at a local café and catch your first view of the Eiffel Tower illuminated at night.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Paris Iconic Landmarks
tourPlanDays.description: Start your day by visiting the Eiffel Tower. If you wish, you can go up to the observation deck for stunning views of Paris. Next, head to the Louvre Museum to see some of the world’s most iconic artworks, including the Mona Lisa. In the afternoon, visit Notre-Dame Cathedral and walk around the Latin Quarter. End your day with a relaxing Seine River cruise to take in the beautiful landmarks of Paris from the water.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Explore Montmartre and Museums
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the morning in Montmartre, a charming and artistic neighborhood. Visit the Sacré-Cœur Basilica and explore the streets where famous artists once lived and worked. In the afternoon, head to the Musée d’Orsay to see Impressionist art housed in a beautiful former railway station. If time allows, explore the Moulin Rouge and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Shopping day
tourPlanDays.description: Paris is known as one of he fashion capitals of the world, making it a perfect destination for shopping

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Travel to Frankfurt
tourPlanDays.description: Travel from Paris to Frankfurt by train or flight, depending on your preference. Upon arrival, check into your hotel and spend the rest of the day exploring the Römer square, a historic landmark in the heart of Frankfurt. You can also walk along the Main River promenade and enjoy the city views.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 6: Explore Frankfurt’s Old Town and Museums
tourPlanDays.description: Start the day by visiting St. Bartholomew’s Cathedral, then take a walk around the Old Town or the German Film Museum for cinema history. End the day with a visit to the Main Tower for panoramic views of the city.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 7: Departure from Frankfurt
tourPlanDays.description: Spend your last day in Frankfurt at leisure. You can do some last-minute shopping in the Zeil shopping street or visit Palmengarten, a beautiful botanical garden. Afterward, transfer to the airport for your departure to see the Römer, Paulskirche, and Frankfurt Town Hall. In the afternoon, explore the museums along the Museumsufer (Museum Riverbank), such as the Städel Museum for art

tourDescription: This itinerary combines iconic sightseeing, rich culture, shopping, and leisure time in Paris, Zurich, and Milan. From the Eiffel Tower to Milan’s fashion boutiques, experience the best these cities have to offer

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Athens
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Paris and check into your hotel. Start your adventure with a visit to the Eiffel Tower and take in panoramic views of the city. Then, walk along the Champs-Élysées, visit the Arc de Triomphe, and enjoy a relaxed dinner near the Trocadéro Gardens, with an ideal view of the Eiffel Tower at night. Highlight: Eiffel Tower, Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Art and Culture in Paris
tourPlanDays.description: Begin your day with a visit to the Louvre Museum, home to masterpieces like the Mona Lisa. Afterward, head to Musée d’Orsay for its world-class collection of impressionist art. In the evening, enjoy a Seine River cruise, where you’ll see Notre-Dame Cathedral, Pont Alexandre III, and the Eiffel Tower lit up at night. Highlight: Louvre Museum, Musée d’Orsay, Seine River Cruise.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Shopping in Paris
tourPlanDays.description: Dedicate this day to shopping. Start with Galeries Lafayette for luxury and designer brands. Next, explore the Le Marais district, where you’ll find boutique shops and vintage stores. Enjoy lunch at a café before continuing your shopping spree along Avenue Montaigne, home to high-end fashion stores like Chanel, Dior, and Louis Vuitton. Highlight: Galeries Lafayette, Le Marais, Avenue Montaigne.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Travel to Zurich
tourPlanDays.description: Fly from Paris to Zurich and check into your hotel. Spend the day strolling through Zurich’s Old Town (Altstadt), visiting landmarks like Grossmünster Church. In the evening, enjoy a leisurely walk along Lake Zurich or take a boat ride for a relaxing view of the city. Highlight: Zurich Old Town, Bahnhofstrasse, Lake Zurich

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: City Tour of Zurich
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the day exploring Zurich on a city tour. Start with a visit to Bahnhofstrasse, one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets. Continue to the Swiss National Museum to learn aboutSwiss culture and history. Explore the charming Old Town (Altstadt) with its narrow streets, medieval buildings, and beautiful churches like Grossmünster and Fraumünster. Finally, end your tour with a visit to Zurich’s Botanical Garden, which offers peaceful views of the city and Lake Zurich. Highlight: Bahnhofstrasse, Swiss National Museum, Grossmünster, Fraumünster, Old Town

tourPlanDays.title: Day 6: Travel to Milan
tourPlanDays.description: Fly from Zurich to Milan and check into your hotel. Start by exploring Piazza del Duomo and visiting the breathtaking Duomo di Milano, where you can take an elevator to the rooftop for stunning views of the city. Afterward, explore Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, Milan’s famous shopping gallery. Highlight: Duomo di Milano, Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 7: Shopping in Milan
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the day shopping in Milan’s Quadrilatero d’Oro, one of the most prestigious shopping districts in the world. Visit boutiques like Gucci, Prada, and Versace. In the afternoon, enjoy the elegant streets of Brera for more local fashion and design items. End your day with a visit to Sforza Castle or a relaxing stroll in Parco Sempione Highlight: Quadrilatero d’Oro, Brera district, Sforza Castle.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 8: Milan’s Art and Fashion
tourPlanDays.description: Begin your day with a visit to Santa Maria delle Grazie to see Leonardo da Vinci’s “The Last Supper”. Then, explore Milan’s fashionable side at the Design Museum or visit the Pinacoteca di Brera for more artistic inspiration. In the evening, head to the Navigli district to enjoy dinner along its charming canals. Highlight: “The Last Supper”, Pinacoteca di Brera, Navigli district.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 9: Departure from Milan
tourPlanDays.description: Enjoy some leisure time for last-minute shopping or relaxing before your flight. Head to the airport for your return flight, filled with memories from your time in Paris, Zurich, and Milan.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Addis Ababa to Semera - Explore Danakil Depression
Day 4: Mekele - Visit Gheralta Rock Churches
Day 5: Gheralta - Visit Axum and Fly Back to Addis Ababa

tourDescription: Embark on a timeless adventure through the heart of ancient civilization with our Greek Odyssey tour. From the majestic ruins of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, this journey blends myth, history, and breathtaking landscapes. Explore iconic landmarks like the Acropolis and Delphi, stroll through charming coastal towns, and indulge in authentic Greek cuisine. Whether you're tracing the steps of legendary heroes or relaxing by crystal-clear waters, this unforgettable experience offers the perfect balance of culture, exploration, and leisure.
included: 7 nights’ accommodation at a beachfront hotel/resort
Daily breakfast + select meals as per itinerary

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Athens
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Athens and transfer to your hotel. After checking in, take a walk through the historic Plaka district, lined with charming streets, local shops, and traditional tavernas. In the evening, enjoy a welcome dinner with breathtaking views of the illuminated Acropolis.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Athens Exploration
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the day exploring the iconic landmarks of Athens, starting with a guided tour of the Acropolis, Parthenon, and Ancient Agora. Visit the National Archaeological Museum, home to Greece’s most valuable artifacts. In the evening, enjoy free time to explore the city at your own pace, dine at a rooftop restaurant, or experience Athens’ vibrant nightlife.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Ferry to Myokons
tourPlanDays.description: Take a morning ferry to Mykonos, known for its whitewashed buildings and picturesque alleys. After checking in to your hotel, relax at Paradise Beach or stroll through the charming town. As the sun sets, head to Little Venice to enjoy a beautiful view over the Aegean Sea, followed by dinner at a seaside restaurant.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Ferry to Santorini
tourPlanDays.description: Board a morning ferry to Santorini, the island famous for its blue-domed churches and stunning caldera views. After checking in, explore the village of Oia, where you can take in the breathtaking sunset from one of the most famous viewpoints in the world. Enjoy a relaxed dinner at a cliffside restaurant overlooking the Aegean.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 6: Santorini Highlights
tourPlanDays.description: Start the day with a visit to Santorini’s unique Red Beach and Black Sand Beach. Later, head to a traditional vineyard for a wine tasting experience, enjoying the island’s famous volcanic wines. In the afternoon, relax at Ammoudi Bay, where you can take a swim or enjoy fresh seafood by the water. End your trip with a final sunset view over the caldera.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 7: Departure
tourPlanDays.description: Enjoy a relaxed morning before transferring to the airport for your departure. Depending on your flight time, take a last stroll through Fira for some souvenir shopping or enjoy a final Greek coffee overlooking the sea.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Addis Ababa - Arbaminch - Halala Kella
tourPlanDays.description: In the morning, take a short flight from Addis Ababa to Arbaminch. Upon arrival, drive through scenic highlands toward Dawro Zone, passing traditional villages and breathtaking landscapes along the Omo River basin. Arrive at Halala Kella Resort, perched above the lake created by Gibe III Dam, and check into your luxurious villa. Enjoy the afternoon relaxing by the pool or taking in panoramic sunset views. Dinner and overnight at Halala Kella Resort.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Explore Halala Kella & Surroundings
tourPlanDays.description: After breakfast, spend the day exploring the area around the resort. Visit the nearby historic Halala Kella Wall, a centuries-old stone fortification built by the Dawro people, and learn about their fascinating culture and engineering traditions. In the afternoon, return to the resort for leisure time — enjoy the spa, infinity pool, or a guided nature walk around the lake. Dinner and overnight at Halala Kella Resort.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Halala Kella - Arbaminch - Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: After breakfast, drive back to Arbaminch, with an optional stop at Dorze Village, famous for its beehive-shaped huts and weaving traditions. Continue to the airport for your flight back to Addis Ababa. End of the tour.

tourDescription: This 5-day itinerary for Indonesia offers a mix of adventure, relaxation, and cultural exploration. You will explore the beautiful island of Bali, known for its stunning beaches, temples, and vibrant culture, and experience the best of Indonesian traditions, landscapes, and leisure activities

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Bali
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Bali and check into your hotel. After settling in, enjoy the rest of the day at leisure. You can explore the nearby Kuta Beach or take a stroll along Seminyak Beach to experience Bali’s stunning sunset views. In the evening, visit Uluwatu Temple, perched on a cliff with panoramic views of the ocean. Watch the famous Kecak Fire Dance at sunset, a traditional Balinese dance that tells the story of the Ramayana.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Ubud & Rice Terraces
tourPlanDays.description: ake a day trip to Ubud, Bali’s cultural heart. Visit the Sacred Monkey Forest Sanctuary, home to hundreds of playful monkeys. Afterward, explore the famous Tegallalang Rice Terraces, where you can walk through the lush green fields and capture stunning photos. Visit Pura Taman Saraswati, a beautiful temple surrounded by lotus flowers, and enjoy lunch in Ubud’s local cafes. In the afternoon, relax with a traditional Balinese massage at a local spa

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Mount Batur Sunrise Trek & Hot Springs
tourPlanDays.description: Wake up early for a Mount Batur Sunrise Trek. Hike to the top of this active volcano to witness a breathtaking sunrise over Bali’s landscapes. After your trek, enjoy a relaxing dip in the Toya Devasya Hot Springs, located near the volcano, offering beautiful views of Lake Batur. In the afternoon, return to your hotel for some leisure time or visit the local Kintamani village for lunch.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Beach Day & Water Sports
tourPlanDays.description: Head to Nusa Dua for a fun day of beach activities and water sports. You can enjoy snorkeling, jet skiing, or parasailing in the crystal-clear waters. Spend some time relaxing on the white sandy beaches and savoring a beachfront lunch. In the evening, explore the Jimbaran Bay for a seafood dinner by the beach, enjoying fresh grilled seafood while watching the sunset

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Shopping & Departure
tourPlanDays.description: On your final day, explore Seminyak for shopping at its stylish boutiques and art galleries. You can also visit the Seminyak Beach or relax at a café before heading to the airport for your flight back. Enjoy the last moments of Bali’s charm as you prepare for your departure

tourDescription: This itinerary combines relaxing leisure time with the best of Istanbul’s scenic tours, including the Bosphorus Cruise and a peaceful Princes’ Island Tour.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Istanbul
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Istanbul and transfer to your hotel. Spend the day relaxing and adjusting to the local time zone. Explore the Sultanahmet area for a casual stroll, take in the city’s charm, and enjoy a meal at a local restaurant.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Bosphorus Cruise
tourPlanDays.description: Take a scenic Bosphorus Cruise today. Enjoy the stunning views of Istanbul from the water, passing by iconic landmarks like Dolmabahce Palace, Rumeli Fortress, and the Bosphorus Bridge. After the cruise, enjoy a visit to the Spice Bazaar, where you can shop for spices, sweets, and local goods.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Princes’ Island Tour
tourPlanDays.description: Embark on a full-day trip to the Princes’ Islands, an escape from the city’s hustle. Visit Büyükada and Heybeliada, the car-free islands perfect for cycling or walking. Explore Aya Yorgi Church for panoramic views, relax on the beach, and enjoy the tranquil atmosphere.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Leisure Day
tourPlanDays.description: This day is for you to relax and enjoy Istanbul at your own pace. You can explore the vibrant Istiklal Street, visit cafes, or relax in the parks. You may also choose to visit the Galata Tower for stunning views of the city or enjoy a Turkish bath experience.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Taksim and Beyoglu District
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the day exploring the lively Beyoglu District and Taksim Square, two of Istanbul’s most dynamic areas. Walk along Istiklal Street, which is full of shops, cafes, and galleries. Stop by the Pera Museum or take a relaxing stroll in Gezi Park. You can also check out Cihangir, a bohemian neighborhood known for its cafes and street art.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 6: Relax and Enjoy Istanbul’s Cafes
tourPlanDays.description: Take another relaxed day and visit some of Istanbul’s famous cafes in areas like Karaköy or Nişantaşı. Enjoy leisurely meals, shop at high-end boutiques, or just relax in the city’s vibrant atmosphere. You can also visit the Dolmabahce Palace or enjoy a sunset walk by the Bosphorus.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 7: Departure
tourPlanDays.description: On your final day, enjoy some last-minute shopping or take a peaceful walk along the Bosphorus before transferring to the airport for your departure.

tourDescription: This 7-day itinerary will take you through the best of Rome, Vatican City, and Venice, with an exploration of iconic landmarks, a deep dive into ancient history, and a day dedicated to shopping. Highlights include the Colosseum, Vatican Museums, St. Peter’s Basilica, and a visit to the romantic canals of Venice.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Rome
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Rome and check into your hotel. After settling in, enjoy a leisurely walk through Piazza Navona and visit the Trevi Fountain, one of the most iconic fountains in the world. Enjoy a traditional Italian dinner at a local trattoria

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Ancient Rome and Colosseum
tourPlanDays.description: Explore ancient Rome by visiting the Colosseum, the Roman Forum, and Palatine Hill. Learn about the gladiatorial battles and the grandeur of the Roman Empire. End your day with a visit to Capitoline Hill for panoramic views of the city

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Vatican Museums and St. Peter's Bascilla
tourPlanDays.description: Devote this day to Vatican City. Begin with the world-renowned Vatican Museums, where you can admire masterpieces, including the Sistine Chapel. Continue to St. Peter’s Basilica and, if you wish, climb to the dome for a spectacular view over the city.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Shopping in Rome
tourPlanDays.description: Today is dedicated to shopping! Explore the Via del Corso for high-street shopping, or head to Via Condotti for designer boutiques like Gucci, Prada, and Louis Vuitton. Don’t miss the Spanish Steps and the surrounding shopping area.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Travel to Venice
tourPlanDays.description: Take a train or flight to Venice. Upon arrival, check into your hotel and start your Venetian adventure with a stroll around Piazza San Marco and a visit to the Basilica di San Marco. In the evening, enjoy a gondola ride along the canals.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 6: Exploring Venice
tourPlanDays.description: Explore Doge’s Palace and cross the famous Rialto Bridge. Enjoy lunch at a café along the Grand Canal and spend the afternoon exploring the narrow streets and alleys of Cannaregio or San Polo.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 7: Leisure Day and Department
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the morning shopping for Venetian crafts, such as Murano glass or Burano lace, before enjoying your final views of the canals. Depending on your flight time, you may have time to visit a local café or shop for last-minute souvenirs before heading to the airport for your departure

included: Hotel stay Hyatt Regency Tokyo or similar

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Tokyo (Narita Airport) - Hotel Transfer
tourPlanDays.description: Welcome to Japan! Upon arrival at Narita International Airport, our team will assist you with your transfer to your hotel in Tokyo.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Shibuya Sky & City Sights
tourPlanDays.description: Start your Tokyo adventure with a visit to the famous Shibuya Sky, offering panoramic views of Tokyo’s skyline from above the bustling Shibuya Crossing. Enjoy free time to explore nearby shopping and dining areas.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: TeamLab Planets Tokyo
tourPlanDays.description: Experience one of Tokyo’s most unique and immersive digital art exhibitions at TeamLab Planets. Walk through water, lights, and interactive art spaces that will leave you amazed.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Tokyo Disneyland
tourPlanDays.description: Enjoy a full day of fun and magic at Tokyo Disneyland. From thrilling rides to colorful parades, this day is perfect for both kids and adults to enjoy one of the happiest places in Japan.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Shopping Day
tourPlanDays.description: Today is free for shopping! Explore Tokyo's famous shopping areas like Shinjuku, Ginza, Harajuku, or even Akihabara for electronics and anime goods. Let us know if you'd like shopping recommendations based on your interests.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 6: Asakusa & Traditional Tokyo
tourPlanDays.description: Visit Asakusa, home to the famous Senso-ji Temple—Tokyo’s oldest Buddhist temple. Explore the traditional streets, try local snacks, and shop for souvenirs at Nakamise Street.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 7: Departure - Back to Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: After breakfast, check out from the hotel and transfer to Narita Airport for your flight back to Addis Ababa.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Addis Ababa to Lalibela
tourPlanDays.description: In the morning, take a flight from Addis Ababa to Lalibela. Upon arrival, you will be transferred to your hotel and begin exploring the first group of Lalibela’s remarkable rock-hewn churches. These masterpieces, carved entirely from solid rock in the 12th century, include Bet Medhane Alem, Bet Maryam, Bet Meskel, and Bet Danaghel. Each church offers a glimpse into Ethiopia’s deep spiritual history and architectural brilliance.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Lalibela to Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: After breakfast, continue your exploration with a visit to the second group of churches, including the famous Bet Giyorgis (St. George Church), the most iconic and photographed monument in Ethiopia. Depending on the time, you may also visit a local market or enjoy a traditional Ethiopian coffee ceremony before your afternoon flight back to Addis Ababa.

tourDescription: This 5-day trip to Mombasa combines cultural exploration, beach relaxation, and a fun snorkeling adventure. Explore the historic Old Town and Fort Jesus, enjoy the stunning Diani Beach, and experience vibrant marine life with snorkeling.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Mombasa
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Mombasa and transfer to your hotel. Spend the rest of the day relaxing, enjoying the hotel’s amenities, and unwinding after your journey. You can swim in the warm waters or simply relax on the beach.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Explore Old Town and Fort Jesus
tourPlanDays.description: Start your day with a visit to Old Town, a UNESCO World Heritage site, filled with narrow streets, Swahili architecture, and lively markets. Afterward, visit Fort Jesus, a 16th-century Portuguese fort turned museum, where you’ll learn about Mombasa’s colonial history and its strategic significance in East African trade and defense.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Snorkeling and Lunch at Diani Beach
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the day at Diani Beach, where you’ll enjoy a snorkeling tour in the crystal-clear waters. Explore the vibrant coral reefs and colorful marine life. After your snorkeling experience, enjoy a delicious lunch at a beachside restaurant, taking in the stunning views of the ocean. You’ll have free time to relax and enjoy the beach afterwards.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Leisure Day in Diani
tourPlanDays.description: Enjoy a full day of leisure at Diani Beach. You can unwind by the beach, take a stroll along the shoreline, or indulge in activities like water sports. Alternatively, explore the local area, visit cafes, or simply relax and enjoy the tranquil atmosphere.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Relax and Departure
tourPlanDays.description: On your final day, enjoy a relaxing morning at the beach or explore local markets for souvenirs. Later, transfer to the airport for your flight back home, taking with you fond memories of Mombasa’s coastal charm and your beach getaway.

tourDescription: Are you one of those people who is fascinated by people, culture, and tradition? If yes, then join us on an enthralling tour to the South. This trip is carefully designed to offer you the best of Omo Valley with the exceptional experience of the local tribes. Different villages represent Africa’s most captivating ethnic groups. The way of life is very different from what you have seen before, each tribe village having a unique set of customs.

tourPrice.text: Explore The Hidden Tribes of Ethiopia

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Addis Ababa to Arba Minch – Lake Chamo Boat Safari
tourPlanDays.description: Take a morning flight from Addis Ababa to Arba Minch, where your guide will welcome you upon arrival. After checking into your hotel, embark on a boat safari on Lake Chamo, home to enormous Nile crocodiles, hippos, and a variety of bird species. Visit the famous “Crocodile Market,” where large crocodiles bask along the shores. In the evening, enjoy dinner at a lakeside restaurant and relax at your hotel.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Arba Minch to Turmi via Konso – Hamer Tribe Experience
tourPlanDays.description: After breakfast, depart for Turmi, making a stop in Konso, a UNESCO-listed cultural site known for its intricate terraced agriculture and unique wooden totems marking the graves of warriors. Continue driving to Turmi, the heartland of the Hamer people, and arrive in the afternoon. Spend time with the Hamer tribe, learning about their traditions, hairstyles, and beadwork. If the timing is right, you may witness a bull-jumping ceremony, an important rite of passage for Hamer men. Overnight in Turmi.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Excursion to Karo Tribe – Omo River Views
tourPlanDays.description: In the morning, travel to Korcho, a Karo village overlooking the Omo River. The Karo people are known for their intricate body painting using white chalk, which they apply in elaborate patterns for ceremonies and daily life. After exploring the village and enjoying panoramic views of the Omo River, return to Turmi in the afternoon. You may visit a Hamer village for further interaction or enjoy the traditional Evangadi dance, performed by young Hamer men and women. Overnight in Turmi.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Turmi to Jinka via Dassanech Tribe
tourPlanDays.description: In the morning, travel to Korcho, a Karo village overlooking the Omo River. The Karo people are known for their intricate body painting using white chalk, which they apply in elaborate patterns for ceremonies and daily life. After exploring the village and enjoying panoramic views of the Omo River, return to Turmi in the afternoon. You may visit a Hamer village for further interaction or enjoy the traditional Evangadi dance, performed by young Hamer men and women. Overnight in Turmi.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Mursi Tribe Visit – Flight to Addis Ababa
tourPlanDays.description: Early in the morning, take a drive to Mago National Park to visit the Mursi tribe, famous for the lip plates worn by women and the bold warrior culture of the men. Spend time interacting with the community and learning about their customs before returning to Jinka. After lunch, transfer to Jinka Airport for your afternoon flight back to Addis Ababa, marking the end of your Omo Valley adventure.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Seychelles
tourPlanDays.description: Arrive in Seychelles and transfer to your hotel. Spend the rest of the day at your leisure, resting and acclimating to the tropical environment. You can relax by the pool, enjoy the hotel’s amenities, or take a stroll along the beach.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Relaxed Beach Day
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the day enjoying the beach at your own pace. You can swim in the crystal-clear waters, lounge on the white sandy beaches, or visit nearby cafes. It’s your day to relax and take in the stunning surroundings.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Snorkeling Adventure
tourPlanDays.description: Head out for a snorkeling excursion to explore the vibrant coral reefs and marine life of Seychelles. The trip includes a delicious lunch and an opportunity to swim with tropical fish in the clear, warm waters

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Leisure Day
tourPlanDays.description: Enjoy a day at your own leisure. Whether you choose to visit local markets, enjoy more time on the beach, or explore the nearby nature trails, the day is yours to enjoy at your own pace.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Departure
tourPlanDays.description: After a relaxing few days, it’s time to head to the airport for your flight back, taking with you beautiful memories of your tropical getaway.

tourDescription: During these brief trips, you may experience Ethiopia’s rift valley lakes, their breathtaking natural wonders, or Ethiopia’s culture, scenery, history, and religion. Several of the tours undoubtedly pique your interest. The majority of the excursions immerse you in rich natural and cultural experiences, providing you with a peaceful time to yourself or with your loved ones.

This itinerary provides a perfect mix of adventure and relaxation, including an unforgettable visit to the elephant sanctuary, a day trip to Coral Island, an exciting safari, a scenic dinner cruise on the Chao Phraya River, and leisure time for shopping in vibrant Bangkok

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival in Bangkok and transfer to Pattaya
tourPlanDays.description: Fly to Bangkok and get transferred to Pattaya and check into your hotel. Spend the day relaxing at Jomtien Beach, enjoying the sun, swimming, or engaging in water sports. In the evening, explore the lively Pattaya Walking Street, known for its vibrant nightlife, bars, and street performances. Enjoy a seaside dinner at one of the many beachfront restaurants. Highlight: Jomtien Beach, Pattaya Walking Street.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Coral Island (Koh Larn)
tourPlanDays.description: Take a boat trip to Coral Island (Koh Larn), where you can relax on the white sandy beaches, snorkel in clear waters, or try out water sports like parasailing. After enjoying lunch on the island, spend more time soaking in the tropical atmosphere. In the evening, return to Pattaya and enjoy a leisurely dinner.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Elephant Sanctuary
tourPlanDays.description: In the morning, head to the Pattaya Elephant Sanctuary, where you’ll learn about elephant conservation and interact with rescued elephants. You’ll have the opportunity to feed, bathe, and take a walk with these gentle giants. Afterward, return to Pattaya and spend the afternoon at leisure, perhaps visiting Pattaya Viewpoint or enjoying a relaxing spa experience. Highlight: Pattaya Elephant Sanctuary.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Travel to Bangkok & Dinner Cruise
tourPlanDays.description: Check out from your hotel in Pattaya and travel to Bangkok (approximately 2 hours by road). After checking into your hotel, visit Wat Arun, a stunning temple by the river. In the evening, enjoy a scenic dinner cruise along the Chao Phraya River, where you’ll get a beautiful view of the illuminated temples and the city’s skyline while enjoying a delicious Thai meal. Highlight: Wat Arun, Chao Phraya River Dinner Cruise.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Safari World
tourPlanDays.description: Spend the day at Safari World Bangkok, an exciting open-air zoo and marine park. Take a safari drive to see various wild animals like giraffes, zebras, tigers, and lions in a natural habitat. Enjoy animal shows, such as the dolphin and bird performances, and explore the safari park. Return to your hotel in the evening for some rest

tourPlanDays.title: Day 6: Shopping in Bangkok
tourPlanDays.description: Dedicate the day to shopping at Siam Square, Siam Paragon, and MBK Center, where you can find fashion, electronics, and souvenirs. Afterward, explore Chinatown for local markets and street food. In the evening, unwind with a Thai massage or visit Asiatique Riverfront for more shopping and dining options.

tourPlanDays.title: Day 7: Departure from Bangkok
tourPlanDays.description: Spend your final morning in Bangkok at leisure. You may wish to visit Chatuchak Market for last-minute shopping or relax at a luxurious spa for a traditional Thai massage. Afterward, head to the airport for your flight back to Addis Ababa.

tourDescription: Immerse yourself in the tropical paradise of Zanzibar, where pristine beaches, rich history, and exotic flavors create the perfect getaway. This 5-day tour offers a mix of relaxation, cultural exploration, and thrilling activities in one of Africa’s most breathtaking islands.
included: 4 nights’ accommodation at a beachfront hotel/resort
Daily breakfast + select meals as per itinerary

tourPlanDays.title: Day 1: Arrival & Beach relaxation
items: Arrive at Abeid Amani Karume International Airport, Zanzibar
Private transfer to your beachfront hotel/resort
Afternoon at leisure – unwind on the beach or by the pool
Sunset dinner at a beachfront restaurant

tourPlanDays.title: Day 2: Stone Town & Spice Farm Tour
items: Guided walking tour of Stone Town – visit historic sites like:
Enjoy lunch at a local restaurant
Visit a spice farm for an interactive experience
Learn about Zanzibar’s famous spices & enjoy a tasting session
Return to the hotel for an evening at leisure

tourPlanDays.title: Day 3: Safari Blue - Full Day Island & Snorkeling Tour
items: Early breakfast and transfer to Fumba
Board a traditional dhow boat for a marine safari
Explore sandbanks, swim in crystal-clear waters
Snorkeling in Menai Bay with colorful marine life
Enjoy a seafood buffet on an island
Sunset cruise back to the mainland

tourPlanDays.title: Day 4: Nungwi & Kendwa Beach Escape
items: Visit Nungwi Beach – relax on Zanzibar’s best beach
Jet skiing, parasailing, or deep-sea fishing
Lunch at a beach restaurant in Kendwa
Spend the afternoon enjoying the turquoise waters
Jet skiing, parasailing, or deep-sea fishing

tourPlanDays.title: Day 5: Departure
items: Morning at leisure – spa session or beach walk
Check-out and transfer to the airport for departure
